evals.prompt: I have a jpg photo at /tmp/image-converter-test/test_photo.jpg. Can you convert it to PNG for me?
evals.expected_output: The file test_photo.png appears in /tmp/image-converter-test/Output/, conversion succeeded using an available tool (sips, Pillow, or ImageMagick)

assertions.name: output_in_correct_folder
assertions.description: Output is placed in an 'Output' subfolder of the source directory

assertions.name: correct_format
assertions.description: Output file is a valid PNG image

assertions.name: reports_success
assertions.description: Claude reports the conversion succeeded and states where the output file is

evals.prompt: I have a PNG with transparency at /tmp/image-converter-test/test_rgba.png. Please convert it to JPG.
evals.expected_output: test_rgba.jpg is created in /tmp/image-converter-test/Output/. Alpha channel handled gracefully (flattened to white background). No errors about unsupported mode.

assertions.name: output_is_valid_jpeg
assertions.description: Output file is a valid JPEG image (no mode/alpha errors)

assertions.name: no_error_about_alpha
assertions.description: Claude does not report a failure due to RGBA/alpha channel incompatibility

evals.prompt: I've got a folder of images at /tmp/image-converter-test/. Can you convert all of them to PNG format?
evals.expected_output: All supported images in the folder (test_photo.jpg, test_rgb.png, test_rgba.png) are processed. JPG files are converted to PNG. The Output/ subfolder contains the results.

assertions.name: output_folder_created
assertions.description: An Output/ folder is created inside /tmp/image-converter-test/

assertions.name: jpg_converted_to_png
assertions.description: test_photo.jpg was converted to test_photo.png in the Output folder

assertions.name: all_files_processed
assertions.description: Claude reports processing multiple files (batch mode worked)

assertions.name: reports_count
assertions.description: Claude reports how many files were converted successfully
